title: Aries Spears: Hollywood, Look I'm Smiling
original_title: Aries Spears: Hollywood, Look I'm Smiling
overview: Hollywood, Look I m Smiling is a laugh-out-loud and insightful comedy concert starring Mad TV s break-out star Aries Spears. Spears is in rare form as he tackles controversial topics such as political correctness , the Hollywood establishment and race relations in America.
